# Report Output Requirements Quality Checklist: Capital Gains Report PDF And Audit Annex

**Purpose**: Validate whether report output, PDF, Markdown annex, and audit-annex requirements are complete, clear, consistent, and implementation-ready.
**Created**: 2026-07-03
**Feature**: `/specs/008-report-pdf-annex/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are output-format selection requirements complete for both accepted formats and unsupported or empty selections? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002, Contract `report-output.md` §Output Formats]
- [x] CHK002 Are generated-file count requirements defined for both formats, including the Markdown main file and separate Annex 1 file? [Completeness, Spec §FR-021, Spec §FR-022, Spec §SC-003]
- [x] CHK003 Are user-visible output path communication requirements documented for success and success-with-warning outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-026, Contract `report-output.md` §Result Screen Path Reporting]
- [x] CHK004 Are PDF output requirements complete for page size, filename extension, local generation, and selectable text? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-023, Spec §FR-024, Spec §FR-028]
- [x] CHK005 Are Annex 1 requirements complete for title, section order, Markdown separation, and PDF placement? [Completeness, Spec §FR-016, Spec §FR-017, Spec §FR-021, Spec §FR-022]
- [x] CHK006 Are per-asset audit activity evidence fields fully specified for all required financial traceability data? [Completeness, Spec §FR-018, Spec §FR-019, Contract `report-rendering.md` §Per-Asset Audit Section]
- [x] CHK007 Are Currency Conversion Audit requirements complete for converted activity evidence, no-conversion empty state, and quote direction labels? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015, Spec §FR-020, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK008 Are main report presentation changes fully enumerated for summary rows, headers, labels, historical position, and zero-priced SELL rows? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006 through Spec §FR-014]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK009 Is `as close as practical` defined with objective allowed differences between PDF and Markdown output? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK010 Are `when needed` PDF page break and page title criteria defined clearly enough to avoid subjective layout decisions? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK011 Are `user-friendly label` expectations defined with allowed labels for conversion status and quote direction? [Clarity, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-015, Data Model §RenderLabelMap]
- [x] CHK012 Is the Markdown Annex 1 filename date-segment insertion rule unambiguous when collision suffixes are added? [Clarity, Spec §FR-021, Contract `report-output.md` §Markdown Output Files]
- [x] CHK013 Are `activity details` in per-asset audit entries decomposed into mandatory fields rather than broad wording only? [Clarity, Spec §FR-019, Data Model §AuditActivityEntry]
- [x] CHK014 Is `text-based searchable PDF` clarified with PDF text selection and search criteria rather than reader-specific assumptions? [Clarity, Spec §FR-024, Spec §SC-010]
- [x] CHK015 Are `other secrets` categories in report and failure-message requirements defined sufficiently for reviewers? [Clarity, Spec §FR-027, Spec §Security, Persistence, And Integration Evidence]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK016 Are Markdown and PDF output count requirements consistent between success criteria, output contracts, and the output bundle model? [Consistency, Spec §SC-003, Contract `report-output.md` §Output Formats, Data Model §ReportOutputBundle]
- [x] CHK017 Are Currency Conversion Audit placement requirements consistent across clarifications, functional requirements, and rendering contracts? [Consistency, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §FR-020, Contract `report-rendering.md` §Currency Conversion Audit In Annex 1]
- [x] CHK018 Are label-mapping failure requirements consistent between edge cases, functional requirements, data model rules, and plan failure handling? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-015, Spec §Edge Cases, Data Model §RenderLabelMap, Plan §Failure Handling]
- [x] CHK019 Are no-new-calculation assumptions consistent with Annex 1 requirements for per-activity gain or loss evidence? [Consistency, Spec §FR-019, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §Financial Calculation Evidence]
- [x] CHK020 Are local-only and no-remote-service requirements consistent between the spec, plan, contracts, and dependency decisions? [Consistency, Spec §FR-028, Plan §PDF Dependency Decision, Contract `report-output.md` §Locality]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK021 Are format equivalence success criteria measurable without relying on subjective layout similarity? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]
- [x] CHK022 Is the 10,000 cached-activity scale target tied to both PDF and Annex 1 generation, not just the existing Markdown path? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-009, Plan §Performance Goals]
- [x] CHK023 Are success criteria defined for automatic-open warning outcomes while still listing every generated output path? [Gap, Spec §FR-026, Contract `report-output.md` §Result Screen Path Reporting]
- [x] CHK024 Are PDF selectable-text success criteria objectively assessable despite differences between PDF readers? [Measurability, Spec §FR-024, Spec §SC-010]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK025 Are primary and alternate scenarios covered for choosing Markdown versus PDF before generation begins? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1]
- [x] CHK026 Are exception scenarios defined for calculation, rendering, writing, syncing, closing, validation, and label-mapping failures? [Coverage, Spec §FR-025, Plan §Failure Handling, Contract `report-output.md` §Failure And Cleanup]
- [x] CHK027 Are recovery requirements documented for partial Markdown bundle failure when one output file has already been created? [Recovery, Contract `report-output.md` §Failure And Cleanup]
- [x] CHK028 Are no-conversion, all-zero summary, historical-only asset, mixed historical/report-year asset, and post-year activity scenarios all addressed? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK029 Is filename collision behavior specified for both Markdown main and Annex 1 files as a matched pair? [Edge Case, Contract `report-output.md` §Markdown Output Files]
- [x] CHK030 Is behavior defined when Annex 1 has no per-asset audit entries or no reported assets? [Gap, Spec §FR-016 through Spec §FR-019, Contract `report-rendering.md` §Annex 1 Structure]
- [ ] CHK031 Are requirements explicit for whether assets appearing only in reference sections belong in Annex 1 per-asset audit evidence? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-018, Spec §Key Entities]
- [x] CHK032 Are requirements defined for long PDF tables across page boundaries, including repeated or preserved column context? [Edge Case, Contract `report-rendering.md` §PDF Rendering Contract]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK033 Are local-only PDF generation requirements tied to dependency, no-telemetry, and no-remote-storage boundaries? [Security, Spec §FR-028, Plan §PDF Dependency Decision]
- [x] CHK034 Are secret-redaction requirements scoped to reports, annexes, failure messages, diagnostics, examples, and fixtures? [Security, Spec §FR-027, Spec §Security, Persistence, And Integration Evidence, Constitution §I]
- [x] CHK035 Are dependency research requirements complete for all direct and transitive PDF/font dependencies? [Dependency, Plan §PDF Dependency Decision, Constitution §IV]
- [x] CHK036 Are exact-decimal and currency-identity requirements preserved in Annex 1 evidence requirements? [Precision, Spec §Financial Calculation Evidence, Constitution §II]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK037 Are assumptions about existing base-currency conversion rules referenced as dependencies rather than restated inconsistently? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Summary]
- [ ] CHK038 Are platform assumptions for Linux, macOS, Windows, and embedded fonts reflected in requirements rather than only implementation planning? [Assumption, Plan §Target Platform, Research §Embedded Font Strategy]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK039 Is `reported asset` defined consistently for assets appearing in summary, detail, reference, and annex sections? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-018, Spec §Key Entities]
- [x] CHK040 Are requirements explicit about how PDF and Markdown table wrapping may differ while preserving the `same table content` requirement? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004, Spec §SC-002]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
